productDisplayName: Lotto Men Grey Sport Line Flip Flops
description: Style Notelotto comes up with this pair of flip flops for those who love the contemporary laidback lifestyle. These flip flops feature colourful branding on their comfy footbed with heavy duty straps. Wear this with denims rolled up at the cuffs and bright tees.Product DetailsBlunt toed, grey and black flip flops with slip on stylingBlack thong straps with a twill tape toe separator with stitched detailsComfortable grey footbed with graffiti style print and brandingRubber outsole with grooves for gripMaterial and CareRubberWipe with clean wet cloth when required
